name: for each option-bearing tool the catalog names the native config target the options are emitted to (no hand-edited per-tool config by the user)
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'bad=[]; YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0])["tools"].each{|k,v| next unless v["option_form"]; bad<<k unless v["emit"]}; STDERR.puts("missing_emit=#{bad.inspect}"); exit(bad.empty? ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/tool-option-surfaces.yaml" && echo option-tools-name-emit-target 1>&2
